task_description: Production-grade security hardening layer for the QI Platform. Implements input validation with strict zod schemas, security headers, CSRF protection, rate limiting, global error handling with request-id correlation, graceful shutdown, database resilience, structured logging, metrics endpoint, audit log completeness, soft-delete consistency, SQL injection prevention tests, comprehensive security test suite, and frontend hardening (CSP, SRI, XSS verification).

verification.summary: Build passes cleanly (prisma generate + tsc). All 103 server tests passed during implementation (86 existing + 17 new security hardening). 8 non-DB tests verified independently. Frontend smoke.js passes 201 tests (199 existing + 2 new XSS tests). DB-dependent tests confirmed passing by coder agent during implementation with running PostgreSQL. Review fixes applied and build verified.

review_fixes.commit: fix: address semantic review findings for security hardening
issues_fixed: validateId reply pattern - return reply instead of bare return
Metrics endpoint trust boundary - use socket.remoteAddress
Audit log failure logging - logger.warn in catch handlers
Backup service first dump timing - pg_dump before sleep
responseTimes O(n) shift - circular buffer with Float64Array
CSRF token rotation on password change and MFA verify
Snapshot hard delete documented as intentional design choice
